siteDescription: Darwin.Web public storefront and member portal foundation with a theme-isolated, CMS-aware shell.
homeMetaDescription: Composable Darwin storefront home built from reusable web parts on top of live CMS and catalog contracts.
cmsIndexMetaDescription: Published storefront content pages delivered from the public CMS contracts.
cmsFallbackMetaDescription: Published CMS content delivered from Darwin.WebApi.
publicApiNotFoundMessage: The requested public resource was not found.
publicApiHttpErrorMessage: The public API request could not be completed.
publicApiInvalidPayloadMessage: The public API returned an invalid response payload.
publicApiNetworkErrorMessage: The public API could not be reached.
cmsDetailWarningsMessage: The page fetch reported status "{status}". The storefront is rendering the content it could resolve.
cmsContentNavigationDescription: Published CMS pages are surfaced here through the same public contract instead of theme-only hard-coded sidebars.
cmsOnThisPageDescription: The storefront now derives section navigation from the published CMS HTML instead of leaving long-form content as one unstructured block.
cmsReadinessDescription: This page is currently operating at a {status} level for public discovery based on live metadata, structure, and navigation signals.
cmsReferencePositionValue: Page {current} of {total} in the current published set
cmsReferencePositionFallback: This page was loaded, but its position could not be derived from the current published set.
cmsFollowUpDescription: CMS detail should not be a dead end. Keep the adjacent storefront paths visible from the same content surface.
cmsAdjacentPageFallback: Published CMS page available for adjacent storefront reading.
cmsPreviousPageEmptyMessage: There is no previous published CMS page in the current storefront navigation set.
cmsNextPageEmptyMessage: There is no next published CMS page in the current storefront navigation set.
cmsRelatedPagesDegradedMessage: The public CMS listing endpoint returned status "{status}" while building this sidebar.
cmsRelatedPagesEmptyMessage: No additional published CMS pages are available for related navigation right now.
cmsIndexDescription: This route consumes the public CMS page list directly. It is meant to validate that the storefront sees the same published content truth that WebAdmin manages.
cmsIndexDegradedTitle: CMS listing is running in degraded mode.
cmsIndexDegradedMessage: The public CMS pages endpoint returned status "{status}". This failure stays visible in the UI instead of collapsing into a silent placeholder.
cmsVisibleSearchPlaceholder: Search the pages loaded on this CMS page
cmsVisibleSearchInfoMessage: This filter only searches the CMS pages already loaded on the current page. It is intentionally not a full CMS search contract.
cmsVisibleSearchFilteredMessage: The current filter "{query}" only applies to the CMS pages already loaded on this page. It is intentionally not a global CMS search.
cmsVisibleStateReadyMessage: This page-local lens keeps only currently loaded CMS pages that already expose both meta title and meta description for stronger public discovery.
cmsVisibleStateNeedsAttentionMessage: This page-local lens keeps only currently loaded CMS pages that still need discovery attention because meta title or meta description is missing.
cmsVisibleSortTitleAscendingMessage: This page-local lens now prioritizes the currently loaded CMS pages alphabetically, so review stays orderly inside the visible window.
cmsVisibleSortReadyFirstMessage: This page-local lens now prioritizes discovery-ready pages first inside the visible window, so stronger public-content candidates are easier to review.
cmsVisibleSortAttentionFirstMessage: This page-local lens now prioritizes pages needing metadata attention first inside the visible window, so content debt is easier to review.
cmsResultSummaryMessage: Showing published pages {pageStart} to {pageEnd} of {totalItems}. You are on CMS page {currentPage} of {totalPages}.
cmsResultSummaryFilteredMessage: Showing {visibleCount} visible pages out of {loadedCount} loaded on CMS page {currentPage}, with {totalItems} published pages available overall.
cmsDetailRouteSummaryMessage: Page status: {status}. Related-navigation status: {relatedStatus}. {relatedCount} pages are currently available in the local related set.
cmsGroupingMessage: The CMS index now groups the currently loaded published pages by their visible title initials so the route reads like a browsable content set instead of one undifferentiated wall.
cmsGroupingFilteredMessage: The current visible-result filter also narrows these CMS groups, so the storefront keeps the grouping honest to the exact pages shown right now.
cmsIndexReadinessMessage: This CMS window is currently operating at a {status} level for public discovery review, based on visible ready pages, attention pages, and reading support coverage.
cmsIndexReadinessAttentionValue: {count} visible pages still needing metadata attention
cmsIndexReadinessSupportValue: {groupCount} visible groups and {followUpCount} reading follow-up pages
cmsGroupingLargestSetMessage: The largest visible title group is "{key}" with {count} published pages in the current result window.
cmsGroupingLargestSetFallback: No visible CMS pages are available to derive group size right now.
cmsFollowUpRailMessage: Use the next visible pages as a lightweight reading rail from the same published result window.
cmsFollowUpRailFallback: No additional visible CMS pages are available for a follow-up reading rail right now.
cmsCrossSurfaceMessage: Public CMS browsing should hand off cleanly into the rest of the storefront system, not behave like an isolated content island.
cmsCrossSurfaceHomeDescription: Go back to the composed storefront entry surface to review the broader CMS, catalog, and member system state.
cmsCrossSurfaceCatalogDescription: Carry content discovery into product browsing through the same public front-office shell.
cmsCrossSurfaceAccountDescription: Continue from public content into sign-in, self-service, or the authenticated member portal.
cmsCatalogWindowMessage: The storefront can hand off this CMS surface into {categoryCount} live catalog categories. Category feed status: {categoriesStatus}.
cmsCatalogWindowFallbackDescription: Published category lane available through the live public catalog contracts.
cmsCatalogWindowEmptyMessage: No live catalog categories are available for this CMS handoff right now. Category feed status: {status}.
cmsProductsWindowMessage: The storefront can also move from CMS into {productCount} live product routes. Product feed status: {productsStatus}.
cmsProductsWindowOfferDescription: This is the strongest visible offer right now at {savingsPercent}% savings, currently available for {price}.
cmsProductsWindowFallbackDescription: Published product available through the live public catalog contracts.
cmsProductsWindowEmptyMessage: No live products are available for this CMS handoff right now. Product feed status: {status}.
cmsCartWindowMessage: {itemCount} live cart lines already exist at {total}, so published content can move the shopper directly into the active purchase flow.
cmsCartWindowFallback: No live cart is currently visible, so this CMS route stays focused on content, category, and product discovery.
cmsCampaignWindowMessage: This CMS surface can already hand off into {categoryCount} visible category lanes and {productCount} visible product opportunities, so content can sell through stronger live storefront stories.
cmsCampaignCategoryTitle: {category} is ready as the next browse campaign.
cmsCampaignCategoryFallbackDescription: This visible category lane is already strong enough to continue the CMS story into storefront browse.
cmsCampaignProductTitle: {product} is ready as the next buying story.
cmsCampaignProductDescription: {campaignLabel}: this visible product currently carries a savings signal of {savingsPercent}% and a live storefront price of {price}.
cmsCampaignProductFallbackDescription: {campaignLabel}: this visible product is already live at {price} and ready for the next buying move.
cmsCampaignWindowEmptyMessage: No commerce campaigns are currently derivable from this CMS surface. Category status: {categoriesStatus}. Product status: {productsStatus}.
cmsCardDescriptionFallback: Published CMS page available through the public storefront content contract.
cmsNoPagesMessage: No published CMS pages were returned for this page of the public content surface.
cmsPaginationMessage: Move across the published CMS result windows while preserving the current page-local lens.

menuMessages.emptyMenu: Public CMS menu "{menuName}" returned no top-level links.
menuMessages.notFound: Public CMS menu "{menuName}" was not found.
menuMessages.fallbackDefault: Main navigation is currently rendering from the emergency fallback because the CMS menu fetch returned status "{menuStatus}".
